task_name: Tampa City Council – List Motions and Vote Outcomes
notes: Excellent work. Agent identified 35 recorded votes with comprehensive detail. All key votes correct: minutes adoption (Miranda/Maniscalco), Item 12 abstention (Carlson), Item 14-15 Rome Yard (5-2 with Carlson/Clendenin no), Item 19 unanimous rezoning, Item 22 continuation, Item 23 first reading, Item 25 (6-1 Carlson no), Items 26-28 reconsidered/moved to April 16. Chronologically organized with clear movers, seconders, results, dissents. Summary count accurate (35 total, 33 no dissent, 2 with dissent, 0 failed). Minor: possibly missed 3-5 procedural votes (e.g., some receive/file motions on written reports) but captured all substantive items. Report is professional, readable, and actionable.
